approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities as eligible hedged items, and IAS 21/IFRS 9 specifically address intragroup monetary items whose foreign exchange effects are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats highly probable forecast transactions as a distinct hedging model and expressly contemplates qualifying foreign currency risk on forecast intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 establish net investment hedging as a separate hedge-accounting model for foreign currency risk arising from investments in foreign operations.
